steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is “Many of the 500 or so that exist today are named for a previous owner.” This directly states that the naming convention for surviving Stradivarius violins follows the pattern of honoring former owners.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D identifies Jules Falk as the former owner, aligning with the pattern described in the passage. The other choices either state isolated facts (A/B) or misattribute naming logic (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
